metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1172
metadata.comment: Rationale: In this paper, rat VGAT protein was expressed in PC12 cells that do not exhibit endogenous expression. The protein was targeted to small vesicle populations that were then enriched by subcellular fractionation. Uptake of GABA was measured using radiolabeled (3H) GABA. Saturable uptake of GABA was observed that was significantly higher than in vesicles obtained from non-transfected cells. Uptake was inhibited by uncoupling proton gradients and by high concentrations of related amino acids serving as competitive inhibitors.. Experimental description: The rat unc-47 homologue cDNA subcloned into the plasmid expression vector pcDNA3-Amp (Invitrogen) was introduced into PC12 cells by electroporation30.
